changes.reason: Client expanded business days and hours and specified CST timezone.
The office has moved to a new specific location.

changes.v2_value: sprinkler systems, fire alarms, fire extinguisher inspections, hood suppression systems

changes.v1_value: An active sprinkler discharge or a fire alarm going off.
changes.v2_value: An active sprinkler discharge, a fire alarm going off, or a hood suppression system discharge.
changes.reason: Added hood suppression discharge as an emergency trigger.

changes.v2_value: Try Mike (214-555-0199) for 45s, then Sarah (214-555-0342) for 45s, then take urgent message. Send text summary to 214-555-0500.
changes.reason: Updated to a two-person on-call rotation with a text summary requirement.

changes.v2_value: Hold until the following morning and send a text summary to 214-555-0500.
changes.reason: Added requirement to text the office manager for all calls.

changes.v1_value: If the on-call technician does not pick up within 60 seconds, inform the caller that someone will call them back shortly.
changes.v2_value: 45s timeout for on-call techs; 30s timeout for office hours front desk transfer.
changes.reason: Updated timeout durations and added office hours transfer logic.

changes.v1_value: Use ServiceTrade; do not create sprinkler jobs automatically.
changes.v2_value: Use ServiceTrade; auto-create fire alarm inspection jobs; do not create sprinkler jobs automatically.
changes.reason: Updated to allow automatic job creation for fire alarm inspections.

changes.v2_value: Transfer to front desk (214-555-0100) with 30s timeout.
changes.reason: Defined the handling process for calls received during business hours.

changes.v2_value: Switching to FieldEdge in the future.
changes.reason: Client provided information about an upcoming software migration.

conflicts.resolution: Updated to v2 as the client explicitly stated they expanded their hours.
Updated to v2 because the client stated the main office moved.

conflicts.v2_value: Sequential routing to two technicians with a message failover.
conflicts.resolution: Updated to v2 to reflect the new on-call protocol.

conflicts.v2_value: 45 second timeout for techs, 30 second for office
